issue.title: reconciler doctor: `reconcile-state.mjs --print` shows recorded-vs-derived pipeline step per active issue

successCriteria.description: node reconcile-state.mjs --print lists every activeWork issue with its recorded step/status and the step/status derived from artifacts
Drift between recorded and derived state is visibly flagged
--print is strictly read-only and never mutates state.json

phases.title: Pure report helpers (recorded-vs-derived rows)
phases.summary: Added phaseEqual, buildReport (pure, read-only) and formatReport to packages/framework/scripts/reconcile-state.mjs, reusing deriveTarget/derivePhase/inHistory. node --check passes.
phases.content: Add a pure function buildReport(state, tikiPath) to reconcile-state.mjs that, for each issue:* entry in activeWork, computes a row { workId, number, recordedStatus, recordedStep, recordedPhase, derivedStatus, derivedStep, derivedPhase, drift } using the existing deriveTarget/derivePhase/inHistory helpers. drift is true when the derived (status, step, phase) differs from the recorded values. Also add formatReport(rows) returning a human-readable table string. Export both for testing. No CLI wiring yet, no writes.
verification: buildReport is a pure function that performs no filesystem writes
buildReport reuses deriveTarget/derivePhase/inHistory rather than duplicating logic
formatReport returns a string with one row per active issue

phases.title: Wire the --print CLI flag (both copies)
phases.summary: Wired the read-only --print branch in main() (exits before reconcile()); mirrored both reconcile-state.mjs copies byte-identical. Drop/heal verified live: dropped phase-2 transition left state at EXECUTE 1/3; the wired hook command self-healed it to EXECUTE 2/3 from the plan artifact.
phases.content: In main(), when args.print is set, run buildReport against the resolved tiki path and write formatReport(rows) to stdout, then exit 0 WITHOUT calling reconcile() (strictly read-only). Mirror the entire change into the byte-identical installed copy at .claude/tiki/scripts/reconcile-state.mjs so the two stay in sync.

phases.title: Test the report against a drift fixture
phases.summary: Added two node:test cases to reconcile-state.test.mjs: drift detection (recorded EXECUTE 1/3 vs artifact-derived 2/3) with read-only assertion, and a frozen/paused entry reported in-sync. Full suite: 16/16 pass.
phases.content: Add a node:test case to reconcile-state.test.mjs that builds a fixture where state.json records EXECUTE 1/3 but the plan artifact shows phase 2 executing, calls buildReport, and asserts the row is flagged drift=true with derivedStep EXECUTE and derivedPhase.current 2. Also assert a non-drift case yields drift=false and that buildReport leaves state.json byte-identical on disk.
verification: node --test packages/framework/__tests__/reconcile-state.test.mjs passes including the new case
the new test asserts drift detection AND read-only behavior
